sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ عَلَيْنَا حِمَايَةُ مَعْلُومَاتِنَا الشَّخْصِيَّةِ عِنْدَ اسْتِخْدَامِ الْإِنْتَرْنِتِ.
sentences.translation: Moramo zaštititi svoje lične podatke kada koristimo internet.
sentences.translationEn: We must protect our personal information when using the internet.

sentences.arabic: لَا تَنْشُرْ عُنْوَانَ مَنْزِلِكَ أَوْ رَقْمَ هَاتِفِكَ لِلْغُرَبَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Ne objavljuj adresu svog doma ili broj telefona nepoznatim osobama.
sentences.translationEn: Do not publish your home address or phone number to strangers.

sentences.arabic: اسْتَخْدِمْ كَلِمَةَ مُرُورٍ قَوِيَّةً لِحِسَابَاتِكَ الرَّقْمِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Koristi jaku lozinku za svoje digitalne račune.
sentences.translationEn: Use a strong password for your digital accounts.
